en-US.name: Shiitake Log: Soak & Fruiting
en-US.subtitle: Oyster & Lion's Mane Flush
en-US.promotional_text: Growing mushrooms on logs? Shiitake Log tells you how long to soak each log, when it's rested enough to force, and when the weather brings a flush.
en-US.description:
Growing shiitake, oyster, or lion's mane on hardwood logs? Shiitake Log turns the weather and each log's own cycle into one clear answer - SOAK, FORCE, REST, or HARVEST - so you know what to do in the yard today.

Soaking looks simple until it isn't. Soak too soon and a log won't recover; force too often and you burn through its life; miss a soaking rain and a natural flush slips by. The rules live in extension PDFs and hard-won experience, not on your phone.

HOW IT WORKS

1. Add each log: species and strain, wood type, diameter, bark, and inoculation date.
2. Shiitake Log reads your local temperature, rainfall, and humidity.
3. You get a per-log verdict - how many hours to soak, whether it is rested enough to force, the chance of a natural flush, and when to protect pins and harvest.

Under a minute to add a log. No account required.

CORE FEATURES

Soak Calculator
Soak time is not fixed. Enter air and water temperature, bark, and log age and see how many hours to soak - the closer the water is to the air, the longer it takes.

Today's Verdict
One state per log - SOAK, FORCE, REST, PINNING, or HARVEST - with the reason, so a beginner knows exactly what the yard needs.

Fruiting Chance
A plain Low, Rising, or High outlook from the strain's temperature window, recent rain, and rest, so you can tell when a natural flush is coming.

PRO FEATURES
Upgrade to Pro for deeper insights:
- Track your whole yard with unlimited logs
- Yard dashboard showing every log by state on one screen
- Staggered-soak planner so harvests do not all land at once
- Soak, pinning, harvest, and rest reminders
- Per-log lifespan budget and flush-interval history
- Full flush log with notes

PRIVACY FIRST
- No account, no login
- All data stored locally on your device
- Location is used only to fetch local weather, never stored on any server
- No tracking, no ads, no third-party analytics

Shiitake Log provides cultivation timing guidance based on public weather data and general growing references. Timings are estimates that vary by wood, strain, log condition, and climate - always verify by inspecting your logs and mushrooms. Only eat mushrooms grown from known, labeled spawn that you can positively identify. This app is not a foraging or identification tool and makes no health claims.
